description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a round face and short, neatly combed hair. He is dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt with horizontal striping and a pair of knee-length shorts. His arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, and his hands are open and facing downward. The figure wears low-cut athletic shoes with visible laces and ankle-high socks. The overall build is slender and proportionate, with a natural standing posture. The surface finish is smooth and matte, giving the figure a cartoon-like, approachable look suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylized adult male figure in casual attire, standing upright with relaxed arms and athletic shoes. The figure has a smooth, matte finish and a youthful, approachable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and full details of the t-shirt and shorts, with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm's relaxed position, and the side seam of the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, t-shirt, and shorts, as well as the backs of the shoes and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed arm, with clear visibility of the shoe and sock.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and knee-length shorts
